revision.comment: Bot: create automatic enwiki redirect
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Iburi]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Iburi]] <nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>

Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23455888809|manual triggered pipeline]]
Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Iburi | title = [[:en:Iburi Subprefecture|Iburi Subprefecture]] | image = | listclass = hlist | bodyclass = hlist | border = {{{border|{{#if:{{{list only|}}}|child}}}}} | state = {{{state<includeonly>|autocollapse</includeonly>}}}
| group1 = [[:en:List of cities in Hokkaido|Cities]] | list1 = *[[:en:Date, Hokkaido|Date]] *[[:en:Muroran|Muroran]] *[[:en:Noboribetsu|Noboribetsu]] *[[:en:Tomakomai|Tomakomai]]
| group2 = Districts | list2 = *[[:en:Abuta District, Hokkaido|Abuta District]] **[[:en:Tōyako, Hokkaido|Tōyako]] **[[:en:Toyoura, Hokkaido|Toyoura]] *[[:en:Shiraoi District, Hokkaido|Shiraoi District]] **[[:en:Shiraoi, Hokkaido|Shiraoi]] *[[:en:Usu District, Hokkaido|Usu District]] **[[:en:Sōbetsu, Hokkaido|Sōbetsu]] *[[:en:Yūfutsu District, Hokkaido|Yūfutsu District]] **[[:en:Abira, Hokkaido|Abira]] **[[:en:Atsuma, Hokkaido|Atsuma]] **[[:en:Mukawa, Hokkaido|Mukawa]] }}<noinclude> {{collapsible option}} [[Category:Japan prefecture templates]] [[Category:Iburi Subprefecture| ]]
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
